Services Case Studies About Contact

The 1 AM Drone Pilot Keeping Colorado Construction Projects on Track

My day starts at 1:00 a.m. While you're sleeping, I'm answering emails, processing data, and preparing flight plans for Colorado construction sites. By the time most people wake up, I've already put in four hours on Wet Dog Drones.

Then I commute 64 miles to my day job — which happens to be with my biggest client.

See How We Save Projects Money View Case Studies

"Getting your Part 107 doesn't give you a license to print money. That's the lie we were all sold."

The money's out there. But you've got to chase it. You've got to show up. And you've got to be willing to grind for three years before it clicks.

Construction Progression Monitoring That Pays for Itself

Decision-grade data, 24–48 hour turnaround, Procore-compatible deliverables.

📅 Bi-Weekly Progress Flights

Baseline before anyone steps on site. Return every two weeks with orthomosaics, 3D models, and timeline comparisons. Scale back to monthly after dry-in.

📸 Pre-Construction Documentation

Road damage, interior fixtures, site conditions — all timestamped and georeferenced. When change orders come, you have proof of what was actually there.

🏢 Interior Documentation

84,000 square feet. 20 hours on site. Every fixture, every radiator, every piece of copper — mapped and documented before construction crews arrive.

📊 Volumetric Surveys & 3D Modeling

Cut/fill calculations, stockpile measurements, BIM-ready point clouds. Compatible with Procore, Autodesk, and your VDC workflow.

View Full Services →

The $58 Million Project

14 months of progress compressed into an 85-second time-lapse. Bi-weekly flights through closeout.

See the Timeline →

From Flight to Data in 24–48 Hours

1

Mission Planning

Coordinate with your superintendent, check airspace, plan flight paths. Class D waivers when needed.

2

Data Collection

Part 107 certified pilots. All PPE, safety protocols, FAA compliance. NOTAMs and LAANC on us.

3

Processing & Delivery

Ortho maps, 3D point clouds, timeline comparisons. Procore, Autodesk, and BIM compatible.

Ready to Protect Your Project?

Every project over $5M needs documentation before the first shovel hits dirt. Don't wait for the change order to wish you had proof.
